form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.54) at this track in a Grade 3/4, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Box stats strong with four wins and three placings from 10 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start winner (22.87) at this track in a Grade 5 and will jump from box 2 for the first time. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2 lengths in 23.04, beating Fugenzo. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 401m at this track behind Creeping Tiger beaten 5 lengths (23.44). Is a danger.
